name: Enveric Biosciences, Inc.
summary: Enveric Biosciences, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing next-generation, small-molecule neuroplastogenic therapeutics for psychiatric and neurological disorders. Its lead candidate, EB-003, a novel DMT derivative, is designed to selectively engage 5-HT2A and 5-HT1B receptors to deliver antidepressant and anxiolytic effects without hallucinogenic properties. The company leverages a proprietary drug discovery platform and patent-protected chemical library (Psybrary) to advance non-hallucinogenic psychedelic-inspired compounds through preclinical and clinical development.

products.name: EB-003
products.description: Lead drug candidate; novel DMT derivative targeting 5-HT2A and 5-HT1B receptors for depression and neuropsychiatric disorders without hallucinogenic effects.

products.name: EVM301 Series
products.description: Lead drug program comprising non-hallucinogenic neuroplastogenic small molecules including EB-003 for mental health disorders.

products.name: EVM401 Series
products.description: Pipeline drug series targeting addiction and neuropsychiatric disorders with non-hallucinogenic molecules.

products.name: Psybrary
products.description: Proprietary library of psychedelic-inspired chemical structures used to identify and develop drug candidates for mental health conditions.

products.name: EB-003
products.description: Lead drug candidate, a novel DMT derivative targeting 5-HT2A and 5-HT1B receptors for antidepressant and anxiolytic effects without hallucinations.

products.name: EVM301 Series
products.description: Lead program comprising non-hallucinogenic neuroplastogenic compounds including EB-003 for treatment of mental health disorders.

products.name: EVM401 Series
products.description: Pipeline series of non-hallucinogenic molecules targeting addiction and neuropsychiatric disorders.

products.name: Psybrary
products.description: MagicMed's proprietary library of psychedelic-inspired chemical structures used for drug candidate discovery and development.

partnerships.description: Acquired MagicMed via amalgamation, gaining access to the Psybrary compound library.
Licensed-in conjugates targeting pain relief for osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and cancer via subsidiary Akos Biosciences, Inc.
Acquired Jay Pharma Inc. via tender offer in December 2020, leading to company rename to Enveric Biosciences.
Paid-up license for cannabinoid conjugates targeting pain conditions including osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and cancer, sublicensed through Akos Biosciences, Inc.
Acquired via amalgamation in September 2021, providing access to the Psybrary proprietary compound library.
